name: the-great-displacement
description: Jake Bittle's The Great Displacement — understand how climate change is forcing the largest migration in American history through wildfires, floods, sea-level rise, and extreme weather
useCase: Helps anyone understand the real impact of climate change on American communities — from disaster preparedness and community resilience to personal decisions about where to live.
knownRisks: The book covers climate impacts through 2023 — conditions continue to evolve
